summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FREMAX product catalog system. All major features working correctly including English interface, admin authentication, product datasheet functionality, and not found codes tracking system.

design_issues.issue: Admin panel displays in Portuguese ('PAINEL ADMINISTRATIVO') instead of English
Background color detection shows dark but actual display is white - may be CSS media query issue

passed_tests: Search tabs (CODE/REFERENCE, APPLICATION, MEASUREMENTS) in English
Admin link correctly hidden on public pages
Admin login accessible via /admin/login with admin/admin123
Product page displays correctly with English labels
Datasheet opens at /datasheet/:id with print-friendly layout
Datasheet tabs (SPECS, APPLICATIONS, CROSS REF, LOGISTICS) in English
Not found codes tracking works when searching non-existent products
Admin can access not found codes via API at /admin/not-found-codes
Search results page displays in English
Admin authentication and JWT token system working
Product CRUD operations via API working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor language inconsistency: Admin panel shows Portuguese text instead of English. All core functionality is working perfectly.
